title: PGIMER Notification 2026 - Apply for Junior Research Fellow Posts
description: The Postgraduate Institute of Medical Education & Research (PGIMER) has officially released the vacancies for various Junior Research Fellow Jobs. Candidates who have completed their M.Sc can apply for the PGIMER Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by the deadline for applications. If you are looking for more, here is a li...
